overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban street at dawn. The player passes a police cordon with NCPD vehicles surrounding a building with a crashed construction vehicle on its roof, then continues down the street as a flying vehicle passes overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with digital storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under a covered sidewalk past neon signs and digital displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
pedestrian in leather tank top walking alongside the player

entered.detail: transparent glass and metal roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway
large vertical digital billboard displaying a political advertisement with a man in a suit
yellow building with colorful geometric mural painted on the roof facade
tall palm trees lining the street with brown trunks and green fronds

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a covered commercial sidewalk at dawn, passing under a glass awning. A political billboard and yellow building with a colorful mural are visible in the distance, while palm trees line the street. Other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection approaching emergency scene

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into open street with full sky visibility
crossing the asphalt street while futuristic vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching a police cordon with emergency vehicles visible ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street past the intersection

entered.detail: futuristic police sedan with glowing blue NCPD markings and emergency lights
large yellow excavator crashed through the roof of a building with its arm dangling
heavy armored police vehicle with dark paint parked near the scene

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway into an open street intersection, crossing the asphalt road. A police scene becomes visible ahead with an NCPD car and armored truck parked near a yellow building that has a construction vehicle crashed through its roof. The political billboard and palm trees shift in perspective as the player approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: police cordon with emergency vehicles and crashed object on building

events.description: arriving at police cordon with yellow caution tape blocking the area
flying vehicle appears in the sky approaching from the distance

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe the police scene, looking at the crashed vehicle on the roof and the officers standing guard

notable_agents.action: police officer in tactical gear standing guard with weapon at the cordon line
second officer standing near the NCPD police car observing the area

entered.detail: yellow caution tape strung across the area cordoning off the crash site
futuristic flying car with visible thrusters approaching overhead

segments.scene_description: The player arrives at the police cordon where yellow tape blocks off a building with a crashed excavator on its roof. Two NCPD officers stand guard near their vehicles. A futuristic flying vehicle appears in the sky and begins to pass overhead as the player observes the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban commercial street with overhead transit track

events.description: resumes walking down the street away from the police scene
flying vehicle passes directly overhead and continues down the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the street away from the police scene, looking up at the flying vehicle passing overhead

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving down the street ahead of the player

entered.detail: row of commercial buildings with digital signage, closed metal shutters, and neon lights
elevated transit track structure running above the street with support pillars

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the police scene and continues down the open street, watching the flying vehicle pass overhead and away. Commercial storefronts line the right side with digital billboards, while an elevated monorail track runs above the road. Traffic moves along the street as the player walks toward the distant city skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered commercial walkway into a wide, chaotic urban intersection at dawn. It begins under a glass awning on a sidewalk lined with palm trees, moving past pedestrians toward a distant yellow building adorned with a colorful mural and a political billboard. As the camera exits the covered walkway and crosses the asphalt road, the perspective shifts to reveal a police scene where an NCPD car and armored truck are stationed beside a building with a construction vehicle crashed through its roof. The scene then tightens as the camera reaches the yellow police tape and guarding officers, just as a futuristic flying vehicle descends from the sky to pass overhead. Finally, the camera moves past the cordon and continues down the open street, gliding beneath an elevated monorail track and past digital billboards toward the distant city skyline.
